name: chokepoint-web-shells-emulation
description: Create web shell marker in test web root, spawn cmd.exe with recon commands, encoded PS. Expected: EID 11 (file in web path), EID 1 (cmd.exe child).

detectionQueries.name: Web Root File Creation
detectionQueries.query: DeviceFileEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where FolderPath has 'wwwroot' or FolderPath has 'inetpub' | project Timestamp, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, InitiatingProcessFileName

detectionQueries.name: CMD Recon Commands
detectionQueries.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where FileName == 'cmd.exe' | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('whoami', 'net user', 'net localgroup', 'ipconfig', 'systeminfo') | project Timestamp, DeviceName, ProcessCommandLine

detectionQueries.name: Encoded PowerShell
detectionQueries.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where ProcessCommandLine has '-EncodedCommand' | project Timestamp, DeviceName, ProcessCommandLine
